---
title: "Notes & Code"
aliases:
  - code.html
---

## Notes

#### [Search and Matching: The DMP Model](notes/dmp.qmd)

Notes on unemployment dynamics, the Beveridge curve, and the Diamond–Mortensen–Pissarides model. [PDF version](files/dmp-notes.pdf).

#### [Introduction to Economic and Social Network](files/iesn-notes.pdf)

Course notes for IESN (PKU, Fall 2025): network games, centrality measures, strategic complements and substitutes, and cooperation on networks.

#### [Quantitative Macro using JAX](https://chennoshen239.github.io/compecon-notes/)

Full course notes for graduate Computational Economics (PKU, Spring 2026).

## Code

#### [RunPod Scripts](https://github.com/ChennoShen239/runpod_scripts)

Scripts that automatically send files to a remote server, execute code, and email back the results.

#### [Typst Templates](https://github.com/ChennoShen239/typst_templates)

A collection of Typst templates for academic presentations and course notes.
